name: Cone Attachment
description_html: The Cone Attachment is designed for targeted muscle treatment, focusing on trigger points and smaller muscle areas like the hands and feet. It also helps break up scar tissue and delivers our most precise percussive therapy.

name: Dampener Attachment
description_html: The Dampener Attachment delivers soothing relief for both large and small muscle groups. It targets stubborn knots and tender areas with a gentle, yet firm low-impact treatment to help ease aches and pains.

name: Dampener Plus Attachment
description_html: The Dampener Plus Attachment delivers soothing relief for both large and small muscle groups. It targets stubborn knots and tender areas with a gentle, yet firm low-impact treatment to help ease aches and pains.

name: Heated Percussive Plus Attachment
description_html: The Heated Percussive Plus Attachment prepares your muscles 3x faster than percussive massage alone.¹ With three science-backed temperature levels, it helps to relax stiff muscles, reduce soreness and relieve pain.

name: JetBoots PRO Plus
description_html: JetBoots PRO Plus are the first wireless leg compression boots to combine pneumatic compression, vibration, and infrared LED light — three scientifically proven therapies working together to target muscle soreness, reduce swelling, and fight the fatigue that follows hard training. Built for athletes who put the highest demands on their body and expect their recovery to keep up.

name: Large Ball Attachment
description_html: The Large Ball Attachment is specifically designed with greater surface area and the low impact level needed for treatment of large muscle groups like the glutes, hamstrings and quads.

name: Micro-point Plus Attachment
description_html: The Micro-point Plus Attachment delivers targeted therapy with small micro-points that increase circulation and stimulate smaller muscle groups, making it ideal for focused relief of nagging problem areas.

name: PowerDot 2.0 Butterfly Back Pad
description_html: The Butterfly Back Pad delivers muscle stimulation to your lower back, offering balanced treatment on both sides. Each pack includes one large, reusable butterfly electrode pad. Compatible with PowerDot 2.0 Uno and Duo.

name: PowerDot 2.0 Electrode Pad
description_html: Get the most out of your muscle stimulation by ensuring your electrode pads are in prime condition. Each refill pack includes 2 rectangular electrode pads and 4 round electrode pads. Compatible with PowerDot 2.0 Uno and Duo.

name: RecoveryAir PRO Refurbished
description_html: RecoveryAir PRO puts you in full control of your recovery. With the most customizable compression settings available, you can fine-tune pressure and time preferences across four preset programs — or start with four unique inflation cycles and go freestyle with PRO mode.

name: RecoveryPulse Arm
description_html: RecoveryPulse Arm combines compression, vibration and germanium-infused fabric in one sleeve for convenient pain relief and targeted recovery on the go. Speed up your recovery and relieve minor aches without slowing down.

name: RecoveryTherm Back Refurbished
description_html: RecoveryTherm Back combines heat and targeted vibration to relieve lower back pain, improve mobility and speed up the recovery process. It provides effective relief for muscle tweaks and back pain when you need it most.

name: RecoveryTherm Cube
description_html: RecoveryTherm Cube is a compact, wearable device that delivers instant cold, heat and contrast therapy to help support the treatment of minor injuries, ease pain, reduce swelling and speed up muscle and joint recovery.

description_html: RecoveryTherm Cube is a compact, wearable device that delivers instant cold, heat and contrast therapy to help support the treatment of minor injuries, ease pain, reduce swelling and speed up muscle and joint recovery.

name: RecoveryTherm Knee
description_html: RecoveryTherm Knee combines cold, heat, contrast and vibration therapies for a complete recovery solution. It helps reduce knee discomfort and swelling, speed up recovery, boost blood flow and improve range of motion.

name: RecoveryTherm Knee Refurbished
description_html: RecoveryTherm Knee combines cold, heat, contrast and vibration therapies for a complete recovery solution. It helps reduce knee discomfort and swelling, speed up recovery, boost blood flow and improve range of motion.

name: SleepMask
description_html: Our ultra-comfortable, 100% blackout eye mask features 3 quiet, soothing vibration patterns that are scientifically proven to help you fall asleep faster, stay asleep longer, get deeper sleep and wake up less throughout the night.¹

name: SmartGoggles
description_html: The redesigned SmartGoggles 2nd Gen now feature a 100% blackout design with enhanced comfort. It uses compression massage, heat and vibration therapies to help reduce stress, relieve headaches and improve sleep quality.

name: SmartGoggles Refurbished
description_html: The redesigned SmartGoggles 2nd Gen now feature a 100% blackout design with enhanced comfort. It uses compression massage, heat and vibration therapies to help reduce stress, relieve headaches and improve sleep quality.

name: SmartGoggles Refurbished
description_html: SmartGoggles use soothing vibration, heat and massage therapies to improve sleep quality, boost deep sleep, enhance relaxation and reduce stress — making them the perfect addition to your bedtime routine.

name: Standard Ball Attachment
description_html: The Standard Ball Attachment is designed for use on both large and small muscle groups. Its firm, compact surface provides medium-impact massage therapy, perfect for fast relief and quick reactivation of sore muscles.

name: Standard Ball Plus Attachment
description_html: The Standard Ball Plus Attachment is designed for use on both large and small muscle groups. Its firm, compact surface provides medium-impact massage therapy, perfect for fast relief and quick reactivation of sore muscles.

name: Supersoft Attachment
description_html: The Supersoft Attachment is ultra-gentle and soft to the touch for particularly sore muscles or areas of your body that need a lighter touch. Perfect for sore and tender areas around elbows, knees and joints. Includes 2 foam replacements.

name: TheraCup
description_html: TheraCup combines suction, heat and vibration for targeted pain relief and faster recovery. With three cup sizes and digital controls, it's perfect for both at-home use and professionals seeking portable therapy for their sessions.

name: TheraCup Refurbished
description_html: TheraCup combines suction, heat and vibration for targeted pain relief and faster recovery. With three cup sizes and digital controls, it's perfect for both at-home use and professionals seeking portable therapy for their sessions.

name: TheraFace Cleansing Ring
description_html: The TheraFace PRO Cleansing Ring replacement boosts the effectiveness of cleansing by helping to remove dirt, oil, dead skin and other pore-clogging debris, leaving your skin feeling deeply refreshed. Replace every 90 days for best results.

name: TheraFace Cleansing Ring
description_html: The TheraFace PRO Cleansing Ring replacement boosts the effectiveness of cleansing by helping to remove dirt, oil, dead skin and other pore-clogging debris, leaving your skin feeling deeply refreshed. Replace every 90 days for best results.

name: TheraFace Depuffing Wand
description_html: Depuff anytime, anywhere with cold and heat treatments clinically proven to reduce under-eye puffiness, improve elasticity and enhance radiance. The contoured tip is designed to easily massage around the eyes and face to encourage lymphatic drainage, with visible results after one treatment.

name: TheraFace Depuffing Wand
description_html: Depuff anytime, anywhere with cold and heat treatments clinically proven to reduce under-eye puffiness, diminish dark circles and enhance radiance. The contoured tip is also designed for heated lymphatic massage movements around the eyes and face, with visible results after one treatment.

description_html: Depuff anytime, anywhere with cold and heat treatments clinically proven to reduce under-eye puffiness, diminish dark circles and enhance radiance. description_html: The Hot and Cold Rings are compatible with the TheraFace PRO (sold separately). They help reduce under-eye puffiness, relieve tension and pain, and help decrease swelling — leaving you with a natural glow.

name: TheraFace Hot and Cold Rings
description_html: The Hot and Cold Rings are compatible with the TheraFace PRO (sold separately). They help reduce under-eye puffiness, relieve tension and pain, and help decrease swelling — leaving you with a natural glow.

name: TheraFace LED Light Ring
description_html: The TheraFace PRO LED Light Ring replacement offers 3 powerful light therapies in one: Red LED to firm skin and reduce fine lines and wrinkles, Red + Infrared LED to help reduce dark spots and enhance radiance, and Blue LED to fight acne and acne-causing bacteria.

name: TheraFace LED Light Ring
description_html: The TheraFace PRO LED Light Ring replacement offers 3 powerful light therapies in one: Red LED to firm skin and reduce fine lines and wrinkles, Red + Infrared LED to help reduce dark spots and enhance radiance, and Blue LED to fight acne and acne-causing bacteria.

name: TheraFace Mask
description_html: Breakthrough FDA cleared LED skincare mask with 648 lights that deliver effective, full-face Red, Red + Infrared and Blue light with added tension-relieving vibration therapy. Clinical studies showed firmer, smoother, healthier-looking skin with a visible reduction in fine lines and dark spots in as little as 8 weeks.¹

name: TheraFace Mask Glo
description_html: TheraFace Mask Glo LED face mask combines 504 red, infrared and blue LED lights with a gentle scalp massage to increase circulation and relieve tension in just 12 minutes a day. Clinically proven to reduce under-eye wrinkles and fine lines, enhance radiance, and lift sagging skin in as little as 8 weeks.¹

name: TheraFace Mask Refurbished
description_html: Experience more radiant skin with our most advanced LED mask powered by 648 red, red + infrared and blue lights. It’s clinically proven to firm and smooth skin while reducing fine lines and dark spots in as little as 8 weeks.¹ Plus, it offers gentle vibration massage on the face and scalp for enhanced relaxation.

name: TheraFace Mask Travel Case
description_html: The TheraFace Mask Travel Case features a luxe velvet interior, faux leather exterior and a double-sided zipper for easy access. Perfect for flights or road trips, this case lets you easily pack and protect your mask so it’s ready to go wherever you do.

name: TheraFace PRO
description_html: The all-in-one, clinically-proven skincare device for healthier, glowing skin. Combining LED light therapy, microcurrent, facial massage and cleansing, the TheraFace PRO offers complete facial health in the palm of your hand.

name: TheraFace PRO Microcurrent Ring
description_html: The TheraFace PRO Microcurrent Ring gently stimulates muscles to firm, plump and tighten skin while contouring and toning the face and neck. Use with conductive gels such as TheraOne Conductive Gel (sold separately).

name: TheraFace PRO Microcurrent Ring
description_html: The TheraFace PRO Microcurrent Ring gently stimulates muscles to firm, plump and tighten skin while contouring and toning the face and neck. Use with conductive gels such as TheraOne Conductive Gel (sold separately).

name: TheraOne Conductive Gel
description_html: The TheraOne Conductive Gel is a microcurrent activator that ensures proper treatment delivery while restoring the skin’s moisture. It’s the first essential step in your TheraFace PRO microcurrent routine.

name: Therabody Lounger
description_html: Therabody Lounger combines zero gravity reclining and multi-sensory sound vibration therapy for immersive mind and body relaxation in the privacy of your home or office. Includes free white glove delivery service and on-site set up.

name: Theragun Cold Plus Attachment
description_html: The Cold Plus Attachment features three science-backed temperature settings designed to effectively relieve pain, reduce swelling and decrease inflammation. Ideal for tender joints, sore muscles and acute injuries.

name: Theragun Elite Refurbished
description_html: Theragun Elite delivers deep, powerful percussive massage with advanced features and customizable controls to help you maximize your warm-up, recover faster, decrease muscle fatigue and improve performance.

name: Theragun Mini
description_html: Theragun Mini is a lightweight massage gun that offers on-the-go relief from aches and pains in a portable design. Whether at the office, mid-flight or on the golf course, it goes wherever you do to ease tension and discomfort.

name: Theragun Mini
description_html: Theragun Mini 3rd Gen is our smallest and lightest massage gun, delivering ultra-portable relief that fits right into your bag. It's your go-to solution for relieving aches, easing tension and reducing stress, wherever life takes you.

name: Theragun Sense
description_html: Your daily two minute stress reset starts with Theragun Sense — the only Theragun made for stress relief. Its built-in LCD screen acts as your personal guide with step-by-step massage gun routines to ease tension, reduce stress and improve sleep so you can keep up with your busy lifestyle.

name: Theragun Sense
description_html: Theragun Sense delivers relaxing massage therapy to help relieve pain, ease soreness, reduce stress and improve sleep. It features an easy-to-use LCD screen that visually guides you through step-by-step massage routines.

description_html: Theragun Sense delivers relaxing massage therapy to help relieve pain, ease soreness, reduce stress and improve sleep. It features an easy-to-use LCD screen that visually guides you through step-by-step massage routines.

name: ThermBack LED
description_html: ThermBack LED is clinically proven to reduce lower back pain using four advanced therapies: LED, far-infrared, heat and vibration. It promotes faster healing, improves mobility and offers customizable treatment options for fast-acting relief.

name: ThermBack LED Velcro Extender Strap
description_html: ThermBack LED Velcro Extender Strap is designed for use with ThermBack LED, providing extra length to help ensure a comfortable, secure fit. It extends ThermBack LED up to 64 inches for maximum comfort and coverage across all body types.

name: Thumb Attachment
description_html: The Thumb Attachment features a high-impact design that mimics the precision of a human thumb. It delivers intense, focused treatment to stubborn areas, making it ideal for trigger points and the lower back.

name: Thumb Plus Attachment
description_html: The Thumb Plus Attachment features a high-impact design that mimics the precision of a human thumb. It delivers intense, focused treatment to stubborn areas, making it ideal for trigger points and the lower back.

name: Vibration Plus Attachment
description_html: The Vibration Plus Attachment helps ease muscle and joint pain with three science-backed vibration speeds that stimulate muscles and boost circulation, making it perfect for effective pre and post-workout recovery.

name: WaveDuo
description_html: The WaveDuo combines traditional foam rolling, powerful vibration and a contoured, ergonomic design to target back and neck muscles along the spine. It helps ease tension, improve mobility and accelerate recovery.

name: WaveDuo Refurbished
description_html: The WaveDuo combines traditional foam rolling, powerful vibration and a contoured, ergonomic design to target back and neck muscles along the spine. It helps ease tension, improve mobility and accelerate recovery.

name: WaveRoller
description_html: The WaveRoller combines traditional foam rolling with powerful vibration to relieve soreness, reduce tension, improve mobility and speed up recovery. Its high-density foam delivers deep pressure to your muscles for maximum relief.

name: WaveSolo
description_html: The WaveSolo reimagines traditional ball massage by combining powerful vibration therapy with pinpointed pressure to reduce muscle soreness and tension, improve mobility and speed up recovery.

name: WaveSolo Refurbished
description_html: The WaveSolo reimagines traditional ball massage by combining powerful vibration therapy with pinpointed pressure to reduce muscle soreness and tension, improve mobility and speed up recovery.

name: Wedge Attachment
description_html: The Wedge Attachment delivers firm pressure to target shoulder blades and IT bands with precision. Perfect for "scraping" and "flushing" motions, it mimics similar deep tissue techniques to improve mobility and circulation.

name: Wedge Plus Attachment
description_html: The Wedge Plus Attachment delivers firm pressure to target shoulder blades and IT bands with precision. Perfect for "scraping" and "flushing" motions, it mimics similar deep tissue techniques to improve mobility and circulation.
